title: Chart Legend
description: An interactive legend component that connects to charts for enhanced user experience, supporting both vertical and horizontal layouts with customizable styling and interactive features.

showcase.title: Chart Legend Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive chart legend demonstrating various features and configurations

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple chart legend with basic configuration

sections.title: Display Modes
sections.description: Chart legend in vertical and horizontal display modes

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Chart legend with interactive click and hover events

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Chart legend with different styling options and configurations

sections.title: Custom Configurations
sections.description: Chart legend with various custom configurations and settings

types.title: AXChartLegendComponent
types.description: Chart Legend Component - Interactive legend that connects to charts for enhanced user experience

props.name: chart
props.description: Chart component instance that must implement AXChartLegendCompatible interface

props.name: legendContainer
props.description: Reference to legend container for measuring dimensions

events.name: itemClick
events.description: Event emitted when a legend item is clicked. Returns the item that was clicked.

events.name: itemMouseEnter
events.description: Event emitted when the mouse enters a legend item

events.name: itemMouseLeave
events.description: Event emitted when the mouse leaves a legend item

methods.name: getDimensions
